user.title: Connect to Pooly
user.description: Enter your Pooly server URL and API key (from Settings → API Key in the Pooly web app). The URL must include the /api path, e.g. https://your-domain/api

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Pooly server
error.no_installations: This account has no pools or spas set up yet

abort.already_configured: This Pooly account is already configured
